title: FUSE
subtitle: Before it explodes, let it melt.

bombs.hint: Tap a bomb to learn more

anxiety.name: Anxiety Bomb
anxiety.description: Born when you don't know what will happen, when things feel out of control. Anxiety builds quietly until it suddenly doesn't.

burden.name: Burden Bomb
burden.description: Tasks undone, expectations unmet, weight unspoken. It forms when you carry too much alone.

injustice.name: Injustice Bomb
injustice.description: Moments where you were at no fault yet had to endure. Suppressed protests harden inside this one.

helplessness.name: Helplessness Bomb
helplessness.description: When effort doesn't reach. When giving up feels like the only choice left.

selfBlame.name: Self-Blame Bomb
selfBlame.description: When the thought 'it was my fault' repeats on loop. Quiet, but it cuts the deepest.

anger.name: Anger Bomb
anger.description: Swallowed rage doesn't disappear. The longer it's suppressed, the bigger and more sudden the explosion.

story.sub1a: In 1592, soldiers saw the Bigyeokjincheonroe and thought:
story.sub2a: In 2026, the people around you looked at you and thought:
story.sub2b: Doesn't seem like a big deal.

screen2.line3: Before it explodes, let it melt.
